comment: Per-dataset intent for routing, schema bundle, and query generation. Keys match eval dataset_id / DataAgentBench query_* names.

agnews.summary: AG News benchmark: news articles with categories (e.g. Sports, World). Full article body text is in MongoDB collection articles.description (not review.text). Titles in articles.title. Filter sports questions by the category/class field when present. SQLite typically holds metadata.db tables article_metadata and authors — join to Mongo articles via article_id. Do not answer news/article questions using a book-review style table named review.

mongodb.role: Primary news corpus: articles with title, description (body), article_id; use aggregation for filters and sorts.

articles.notes: For 'longest description' tasks use LENGTH(description) or $strLenCP; filter Sports before ordering when the question asks for sports only.

sqlite.role: Metadata and authors; join keys to Mongo articles.article_id.

yelp.summary: Yelp: reviews, businesses, users. PostgreSQL: table business_category has columns business_id and category (not category_name). business.attributes is a text dump of Yelp key/value data (often Python-dict-like), not English prose: parking questions must match keys like BikeParking and BusinessParking (e.g. substring '''BikeParking'': ''True''' or regex BusinessParking.*(garage|street|validated|lot|valet).*: True per scripts/reconcile_yelp_ground_truth.py q3). Do not use ILIKE '%bike parking%' / '%business parking%' — those phrases do not appear in attributes. review.date is often TEXT: filter years with review.date::date or CAST(review.date AS date). Reviews use stars; join business to review on business_id. Do not require JOIN business_category unless the question is about categories.

postgresql.role: Canonical relational Yelp: business, review with stars, tip.
generation_hints: When joining a fact table to a dimension table on a shared id column, compare sample values in SCOPED_SCHEMA: if the foreign key uses a different string prefix than the referenced primary key in this benchmark slice, normalize in the join (e.g. REPLACE) so the join is not empty.

Questions that ask which region has the most rows (reviews, orders, etc.) and also ask for an average for that region: compute per-region counts with GROUP BY, pick the region that wins the count, then average only within that region—not one AVG over the entire fact table.

Semi-structured text fields (e.g. attributes) use vendor key/value layouts; align to keys and patterns implied by the question—do not rely on casual English phrases that may never appear in the stored string.

mongodb.role: Document business and checkin; not primary for pure star aggregates on reviews.

duckdb.role: Analytical Yelp slice: review.rating, review.text, join keys business_ref.
generation_hints: Review rows may use business_ref (or similar) while dimension tables use a different business id column name or prefix; align using sample values in SCOPED_SCHEMA before joining.

bookreview.summary: Amazon-style book reviews: table review has rating, title, text, purchase metadata — not news articles.

sqlite.role: Primary: review table for ratings and review text.

DEPS_DEV_V1.summary: NPM/package dependency and GitHub metadata; packages, versions, stars — not Yelp reviews.

sqlite.role: Package and dependency tables per DAB dump.

duckdb.role: Analytical aggregates on package metrics if present.

crmarenapro.summary: CRM / arena-style relational data: customers, orders, territories — follow introspected tables.

GITHUB_REPOS.summary: Repositories, contributors, stars — developer metadata; not consumer reviews.

sqlite.role: Repo and contributor tables per dump.

googlelocal.summary: Local business and reviews (Google Local style); review and business-like tables.

music_brainz_20k.summary: MusicBrainz-style tracks, artists, releases — audio metadata.

PANCANCER_ATLAS.summary: Cancer genomics / TCGA-style facts — clinical and molecular tables.

PATENTS.summary: Patent publications and classifications — legal/tech text, not Yelp.

stockindex.summary: Stock index time series and constituents — financial analytics.

duckdb.role: Windows and aggregates on index data.

sqlite.role: Snapshot tables; quote identifiers if names contain special characters.

stockmarket.summary: Equity / market data — prices, symbols, sectors.

duckdb.role: Analytics and joins on market facts.
